compiled_state.title: Update fix-bug SKILL.md Step 1.5 to check CLI_user tag and skip intent-search when found
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Implementation

In `plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md`, at the START of Step 1.5 (before the budget config read and intent-search dispatch), add a CLI_user tag check:

```
### CLI_user Tag Check (Step 1.5 pre-check)

Before dispatching the intent-search agent, check whether this bug was explicitly reported by a user:

```bash
BUG_TAGS=$(cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" && python3 plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-cli.py show "$BUG_TICKET_ID" 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(' '.join(d.get('tags', [])))" 2>/dev/null || echo "")
```

If `CLI_user` is in `BUG_TAGS`:
- Set `GATE_1A_RESULT="intent-aligned"` directly — do NOT dispatch dso:intent-search
- Record in ticket: `ticket comment <BUG_TICKET_ID> "Gate 1a: skipped (CLI_user tag) — GATE_1A_RESULT=intent-aligned. This bug was explicitly reported by a user."`
- Proceed to Step 1.7 (Gate 1b is skipped since GATE_1A_RESULT is decisive)

If `CLI_user` is NOT in `BUG_TAGS` (or tags are empty/unset):
- Proceed with normal intent-search dispatch below
```

This check must be the FIRST thing in Step 1.5, before the budget config read. The check handles legacy tickets (pre-tags) gracefully by defaulting to empty string (falls through to normal dispatch).

## TDD Requirement

RED eval task 613d-31ab must be completed first. After this implementation, both eval test cases must pass GREEN.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] fix-bug SKILL.md Step 1.5 contains CLI_user check BEFORE intent-search dispatch
  Verify: grep -q "CLI_user" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md
- [ ] Eval test cases from 613d-31ab pass GREEN after SKILL.md update
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && .claude/scripts/dso run-skill-evals.sh plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md
- [ ] Legacy tickets (no tags field) handled gracefully: check defaults to no-tag path
  Verify: Confirmed by inspection — default `|| echo ""` means empty string → not CLI_user → normal dispatch

comments.body:
GAP ANALYSIS AMENDMENTS:

1. [IMPORTANT] Scope the CLI_user check correctly inside Step 1.5 (not before Step 1):
AC addition: 'The CLI_user check is inserted as the first block inside Step 1.5, not before Step 1. Mechanical bugs that skip Step 1.5 are unaffected — they never reach this check.'

2. [IMPORTANT] Explicitly specify the tags extraction pattern and graceful default:
AC addition: 'Extract via: python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(\"CLI_user\" in d.get(\"tags\",[]))" — handles tickets without a tags key (default to empty list) for backward compatibility with older tickets.'
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6 ✓ — fix-bug SKILL.md Step 1.5 updated with CLI_user tag check. GATE_1A_RESULT=intent-aligned path added.
comments.author: Test
